items.name: Wings
items.description:
Rise above the rest with the Gilded Wings of Glory — forged in gold and made for legends. These radiant wings shine with power, blending classic Roblox style and timeless prestige. Perfect for fantasy maps, avatar showcases, high-tier outfits, and players who chase that golden legacy.

🪽 More Colors: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=wings&Category=18&Subcategory=66&CreatorName=Classic+Limiteds&salesTypeFilter=1

✅ Join the Group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/12034553/Classic-Limiteds#!/about

🏛️ Classic Limiteds
